bio: I work on the design and development of machine learning infrastructure and modeling techniques for Google Ads, and I have expertise in LLMs, data analytics and A/B testing. Previously, I was a Postdoctoral Associate at the MIT Media Lab. I hold a PhD in Electrical and Computer Engineering from UC San Diego, and MS/BS degrees in Telecommunication Engineering from the University of Padova, Italy.
name: Lorenzo Coviello
tagline: Machine Learning at Google · MIT Media Lab · UC San Diego
researchStatement: My current research is on machine learning systems. During my PhD and postdoctoral studies, my research was in algorithms and social network analysis. Full publication list on Google Scholar.
